evals.prompt: Enrich the lead jane@acme.com — I want their LinkedIn, title, and the company's funding.
evals.expected_output: A merged enrichment JSON with person (full_name, title, linkedin_url) from Apollo and company (name, domain, funding) from Hunter, derived domain acme.com.
assertions: The skill derives domain acme.com from the email
Step 1 calls https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment as a routed POST
Step 2 calls https://hunter.mpp.paywithlocus.com/hunter/company-enrichment as a routed POST
The output includes person.linkedin_url and company.funding fields
meta.total_cost reflects the executed steps

evals.prompt: Deep-enrich jane@acme.com, her name is Jane Doe and the company is Acme.
evals.expected_output: Enrichment run where firstName=Jane, lastName=Doe, and company=Acme are passed into the Apollo people-enrichment body to improve match rate.
assertions: The people-enrichment body includes first_name Jane, last_name Doe, and organization_name Acme
The people-enrichment body includes email jane@acme.com and domain acme.com
All steps use rail routed

evals.prompt: Enrich jane@acme.com — is there a separate LinkedIn-match fallback step for the person?
evals.expected_output: No. Person identity and LinkedIn match are one Apollo people-enrichment call; the former separate fallback hit the same endpoint with the same match params and was merged into Step 1.
assertions: There is exactly one person-enrichment step in the manifest
Step 1 calls https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/people-enrichment as a routed POST with email and reveal_personal_emails true
person.source is marked apollo

evals.prompt: Run deep enrichment for jane@acme.com; Hunter didn't return funding data.
evals.expected_output: The Apollo org-enrichment fallback (Step 3) runs because funding data was missing, posting the domain in the JSON body.
assertions: Apollo org-enrichment runs only when Hunter returns no funding data
Step 3 calls https://apollo.mpp.paywithlocus.com/apollo/org-enrichment with a POST and domain in the JSON body
company.funding.source reflects apollo for the filled fields

evals.prompt: What does a full gtm-enrichment-deep run cost and what is the cap?
evals.expected_output: Live prices are $0.0084 (Apollo people-enrichment) + $0.01365 (Hunter company-enrichment) + $0.0084 (Apollo org-enrichment fallback); a full run is about $0.03 and each step carries a loose 5.00 USDC maxAmount spending filter.
assertions: The manifest maxAmount is 5.00
Each of the three steps has maxAmount 5.00
A full run with the fallback costs about $0.03 at live prices

evals.prompt: Which payment rail does gtm-enrichment-deep use?
evals.expected_output: Every step is routed MPP via the SELAT Router; there is no direct rail in this skill.
assertions: All three steps have rail routed
The skill notes SELAT_ROUTER_URL must be set
No step uses the direct rail
